title: pterocarpus cambodianus var. parvifolius
intro: Pterocarpus cambodianus var. parvifolius, also known as the Cambodian or Asian Pterocarpus, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Pterocarpus cambodianus var. parvifolius include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress, among others. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
